news.headline: Trump: Tariffs have given US Steel a new lease on life.
Trump: US Steel is going to be here.
Trump's freezes on funding impact farmers, businesses in rural America, causing significant distress with a series of directives.
news.summary: The implementation of multiple directives by the Trump administration has caused distress among farmers and businesses in rural America.

news.headline: Aurora Pharmaceutical launches EquiCoxib, generic version of Equioxx® (firocoxib), FDA-approved for equine pain relief.
news.summary: A pharmaceutical company based in Northfield, Minnesota, revealed on February 13, 2025, the launch of EquiCoxib, an FDA-approved generic version of Equioxx® (firocoxib). EquiCoxib is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) primarily prescribed for alleviating pain and inflammation in animals. This new generic alternative provides consumers with a cost-effective option for managing these conditions.

news.headline: Annual charity event Ride of a Life Time Fundraiser on March 8 aims to top $1.5 million in 2025 for Children's Health.
news.summary: Each year, Life Time organizes a charity event across its destinations to support Children's Miracle Network Hospitals® and local schools and conservation efforts. The event, held in CHANHASSEN, Minn., aims to raise over $1.5 million in 2025. Life Time, listed as (NYSE: LTH), is dedicated to making a positive impact on communities nationwide through this initiative.

news.headline: Trump repeats his threat to Brics of a 100% tariff.
Trump: Brics will be hit if they play with the dollar.
KBRA assigns ratings to BX 2025-ROIC CMBS securitization with $2.78 billion loan for 93 retail assets.
news.summary: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to six classes of BX 2025-ROIC, a CMBS single-borrower securitization. The collateral for this transaction is a $2.78 billion floating-rate, interest-only mortgage loan. The loan is anticipated to have an initial two-year term, with three one-year extension options, and will necessitate monthly interest-only payments. It will be backed by the borrowers' fee simple and leasehold interests in a total of 93 retail assets situated on.

news.headline: Delta Citation buys self-storage facility in Franklin, VA, now Blackwater Self-Storage. Located at 115 Bogart St, rebranding to honor Blackwater River in local community.
news.summary: A commercial real estate development firm based in Midlothian, Virginia, Delta Citation, has acquired a self-storage facility at 115 Bogart Street in Franklin, Virginia. The facility has been rebranded as Blackwater Self-Storage under Delta Citation’s ownership, paying tribute to the Blackwater River in the area. The acquisition signifies the firm’s dedication to improving customer experience.

news.headline: Identity Resolution Software Market set to hit USD 2752 million by 2031 due to cloud-based solutions & rising data integration demands.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, on February 13, 2025, the Identity Resolution Software Market, categorized by type as Cloud Based and Web Based, and by application as Large Enterprises and SMEs, was reported to have reached a value of USD 1398 million in 2024. The market is expected to show growth and reach a higher value in the near future.

news.headline: SambaNova launches DeepSeek-R1 671B running at 198 t/s, achieving unmatched speeds and efficiency, reducing AI training costs by 10X.
news.summary: SambaNova, a company specializing in generative AI technology, has introduced DeepSeek-R1 671B running on SambaNova Cloud, achieving a remarkable speed of 198 tokens per second (t/s). This new model has significantly reduced AI training costs by 10 times, offering unmatched efficiency. The previous obstacle to its widespread adoption, high inference costs and inefficiencies, has been eliminated by SambaNova. This breakthrough has paved the way for efficient AI processing and faster models, setting a new standard in the industry.

news.headline: Trump: I want to tell China’s President Xi and Putin, let's cut the military budget in half.
Trump: There's no reason to build nuclear weapons.
Trump: I had been talking about denuclearizing and we are going to do it.
Trump: I will meet with China and Russia on military spending.
Arm's stock rises as Meta plans to be the first client for their new chip, boosting investor interest.
Trump: I will meet with China at some point.
Immersive VR market forecasted to boom in gaming, training, and simulation by 2030, segmented by type and application.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India, as of February 13, 2025, the Immersive Virtual Reality market has been categorized based on type into Non-Immersion Virtual Reality, Half-Immersion Virtual Reality, and Whole-Immersion Virtual Reality. The segmentation by application includes Entertainment, Engineering, Education, and Commercial areas. This sector promises significant growth and diversification opportunities with a focus on enhancing user experiences and transforming various industries.

news.headline: Trump: I would love to have Russia back in the G7. It was a mistake to kick Russia out.
Trump on China’s President Xi authorizing a TikTok sale: I think so.
Trump: I think we'll raise a staggering amount from tariffs.
OpenSea hints at token launch and CEO mentions the protocol is getting a revamp after turning too "corporate."
news.summary: The launch of the token is a component of a larger restructuring of the protocol, characterized by the CEO as excessively "corporate."

news.headline: JP Morgan predicts Tether may have to sell Bitcoin to comply with U.S. rules; Tether accuses JPM of being bitter.
news.summary: According to reports, JP Morgan has stated that the top stablecoin issuer, Tether, might be required to liquidate its Bitcoin reserves in order to comply with the new regulations suggested by the United States government. In response, Tether has brushed off JP Morgan's remarks, labeling them as "salty." This development highlights the potential impact on Tether's operations as it navigates the regulatory landscape, with Tether being a key player and holding significant amounts of Bitcoin to back its stablecoin.

news.headline: Totem secures $1.3M for friend-finding festival compass, Totem Compass. Expanding operations to meet high demand.
news.summary: A company based in Chattanooga, Tennessee, referred to as Totem, has revealed the completion of a $1.3 million pre-seed funding round. Totem is recognized for its popular friend-finding festival tool, the Totem Compass.

news.headline: Trump: I do believe Putin really wants peace.
Trump: US Steel stock is through the roof.
The ABTC in Mount Laurel, NJ announces its 2025 Board of Governors to advance transplant certification excellence.
news.summary: Mount Laurel, New Jersey - On February 13, 2025, the American Board for Transplant Certification (ABTC) revealed their 2025 Board of Governors. This group consists of industry professionals who are focused on enhancing transplant certification standards. The board will lead initiatives to support this goal, with a significant focus on ensuring the highest quality of certification procedures.

news.headline: Trump: I do not want US Steel to make a deal with Japan.
Trump: Taiwan took our chip business away.
Goldfish Swim School Franchise Group awarded 2024 Franchisee of the Year by IFA, Tracey McCaghy and Steve Marszalek recognized at annual conference.
news.summary: Troy, Michigan - On February 13, 2025, Goldfish Swim School Franchising, LLC's multi-unit franchisees, Tracey McCaghy and Steve Marszalek, were honored at the annual conference of entrepreneurs by the International Franchise Association (IFA). Their outstanding efforts were recognized, highlighting their achievements within the franchise business sector.

news.headline: Trump: I hope to be able to make a deal on TikTok.
Trump: Auto tariff may come same time as other sectoral duties. No exemptions on autos needed with reciprocal tariffs.
Talroo wins three G2 Winter 2025 awards in recruitment marketing, including Leader in Recruitment Marketing. Highly trusted with 90M users.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Talroo, a recruitment marketing tech company, has been awarded three prestigious G2 Winter 2025 awards. This marks the second year in a row that Talroo has been acknowledged as a Leader in Recruitment Marketing, Easiest to Do Business With, and Users Love Us. With a user base exceeding 90 million, including employees from every Fortune 500 company, G2 stands as the most reliable platform globally. Talroo continues to innovate with its Apply Intelligence™ solution to connect employers with frontline and skilled trades talent.

news.headline: United Airlines hits sell rule, Reddit falls 8% despite Nasdaq, Dow Jones rise; growth companies lead over value peers within Russell indexes.
news.summary: During trading today, growth companies in the Russell indexes outperformed value companies by a small margin. United Airlines triggered a sell rule as their stock dropped, while Reddit saw an 8% decrease despite the Nasdaq and Dow Jones indices posting gains. This information was highlighted in live coverage from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Superior Fence & Rail expands to Southeastern Pennsylvania with a new warehouse after regional growth. - 122 characters
news.summary: The leading fence franchise in North America, Superior Fence & Rail, is extending its reach to Southeastern Pennsylvania with the opening of a new warehouse. The move comes as a result of the company's significant growth in the region. This expansion marks an important step in their strategic plan to enhance operations and serve a larger customer base. The new warehouse in Lansdale, Pennsylvania, will support the company's operations and provide services to the local community. This development, announced on February 13, 2025, demonstrates the company's commitment to meeting the increasing demand for quality fencing solutions in the area.

news.headline: 2024 U.S. Form 20-F & French Document d'Enregistrement Universel with Annual Financial Report filed today. #Finance #Transparency
Trump: Defense Secretary Hegseth comments on Ukraine joining NATO were accurate.
Trump: I wanted to make sure Putin wanted to do a deal.
Global Kratom Extract Market projected to grow at 7.8% CAGR, reaching $268.9 million by 2030 from $143.6 million in 2023.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of February 13, 2025, the Kratom Extract Market is categorized based on type (liquid, powder, capsules, gummies) and application (offline, online). The global market size for Kratom Extract is projected to increase from 143.6 million USD in 2023 to approximately 268.9 million USD by 2030.

news.headline: Performant Healthcare achieves CMMI Maturity Level 3, showing commitment to excellence with 3 ISACA appraisals.
news.summary: Performant Healthcare, Inc. (Nasdaq: PHLT) based in Plantation, Florida, a key player in technology-driven payment integrity and eligibility services, disclosed its Level 3 re-appraisal in ISACA’s Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)®. This reaffirmation underscores the company's commitment to providing reliable, top-notch solutions and fostering continuous operational improvement.

news.headline: Trump: War in Ukraine has to end.
Trump: Ukraine would have seat at table in any peace negotiating, along with Russia.
Bancroft Fund Ltd. declares $0.32 per share cash distribution on March 24, 2025 to shareholders of record on March 17, 2025.
news.summary: In Rye, New York on February 13, 2025, the Board of Trustees of Bancroft Fund Ltd. announced a cash distribution of $0.32 per share for common shareholders of record on March 17, 2025. The payment is scheduled for March 24, 2025, and the fund is listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol BCV.

news.headline: Trump: Expects a lot of countries' tariffs to stay the same. I don't expect any exemptions or waivers.
Trump: Canada paying lowest for NATO.
Phoenix Children's, a major pediatric healthcare system, reveals retirement of President & CEO, Robert L. Meyer, after 22 years.
news.summary: The President and CEO of Phoenix Children's healthcare system for the past 22 years, Robert L. Meyer, has announced his retirement. Phoenix Children's is a leading pediatric healthcare system in the nation, known for its rapid growth. The retirement news was shared on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: MountainWest Capital Network names Spencer Eccles 2025 Entrepreneur of the Year. Eccles is former CEO of First Security Corp, current Chairman of Eccles Foundation.
news.summary: A prominent individual, Spencer F. Eccles, who previously served as Chairman and CEO of First Security Corp and who currently holds the position of Chairman and CEO of the George S. and Dolores Doré Eccles Foundation, has been chosen by MountainWest Capital Network (MWCN) to be honored at its 37th annual event. This recognition was announced in Salt Lake City on February 13, 2025. Eccles’ achievements in the business sector and philanthropy have earned him this prestigious accolade.

news.headline: Eagle Financial Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: EFSI) sold an additional 234,375 shares of common stock.
news.summary: In Berryville, Virginia on February 13, 2025, Eagle Financial Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: EFSI), the parent company of Bank of Clarke, reported that the underwriters of its recent public offering have exercised their overallotment option, concluding the sale. No specific numbers were provided regarding the additional shares sold through this option.

news.headline: Trump: The EU doesn’t treat the US right on trade.
Trump tariffs cause price hikes at FireflySci, a cuvette manufacturer in NY. Customers facing challenges due to tariffs.
news.summary: In Long Island, New York, on February 13, 2025, FireflySci, a prominent company specializing in cuvettes, calibration standards, and quartz glass optics, is tackling the obstacles presented by tariffs implemented by the Trump administration. These tariffs, designed to impact various industries, have posed significant challenges for the company. FireflySci, known worldwide for its innovative products, is strategizing to navigate through these imposed tariffs.
